description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a hip roof and a symmetrical facade. The exterior features a combination of light beige and brown wall finishes, with large rectangular windows arranged in even rows on both floors. The front of the house is bordered by a driveway and a small lawn with palm trees, while the rear includes a spacious wooden deck, two swimming pools, and shaded seating areas. The house has a prominent entryway with a small porch and steps leading up to double doors. The roof is dark gray and features multiple ridges, giving it a modern yet classic appearance. The property is surrounded by low hedges and paved walkways, enhancing its residential and inviting character.
description: A spacious, two-story suburban house with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, a front lawn with palm trees, and a backyard featuring pools and a deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, lawn, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with two pools, deck, and shaded seating areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full deck, both pools, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, pool, and side lawn with hedges.
attribute_entryway_design: Double doors with a small porch, steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by large windows.
